name: Emotion Bridge
description: Encoder translating PAD (Pleasure-Arousal-Dominance) emotional dimensions to 39-bit binary strings with causality-drill mechanisms. Captures FELT events — topological field shifts detected before producing emotion. Bridges the pre-cognitive energetic field with conscious emotional experience through geometric encoding of affective space.

core_attributes.pattern: PAD dimensional encoding, FELT event detection, pre-cognitive field sensing
